CustomField.description: True when a responsible official has documented a written supplementation determination per 40 CFR 1502.9(c). Required by VR-001 (new info post-ROD) and VR-006 (tiering to EIS older than 5 years) to unblock stage gate. Part of the administrative record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Responsible official has documented a supplementation review determination. Required before tiering from a prior EIS older than 5 years.
CustomField.label: Supplementation Review Complete
